response.justification: Bogdan has strong multi-language experience and a focus on performance, testing, and secure development, but his recent work is heavily skewed toward Node.js, TypeScript, and web/mobile systems rather than C++ and industrial automation. While he has some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is not recent or extensive enough for the primary role requirements. His lack of explicit cloud or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) exposure is also a concern.
strengths: Strong multi-language proficiency with a focus on performance and testing (e.g., DLang, C++, JavaScript)
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Proven track record in scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (primary role requires deep C++/STL expertise)
No clear exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, etc.) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
Cloud platform experience (Azure) is not mentioned, and recent work is web/mobile-centric

key_factors.factor: Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
